zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Calverley於1442年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親Sir William Calverley18歲，母親Agnes Tempest15歲。她於大約1459年與Christopher de Lister在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1487年在英國英格蘭越可爾米德普享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾桑頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Calverley于1442年出生在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾福利时，她的父亲Sir William Calverley18岁，母亲Agnes Tempest15岁。她于大约1459年与Christopher de Lister在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1487年在英国英格兰越可爾米德普享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾桑頓。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Calverley was born in 1442, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Calverley, was 18 and her mother, Agnes Tempest, was 15. She married Christopher de Lister about 1459, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1487, in Midhope, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Thornton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Calverley est née en 1442, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Calverley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnes Tempest, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher de Lister environ 1459, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1487, à Midhope, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Thornton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Calverley 1442 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Calverley 18 und ihre Mutter Agnes Tempest 15. Sie hat um 1459 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Christopher de Lister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1487 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Midhope, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thornton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calverley è nata il nel 1442 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Calverley, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Agnes Tempest, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Christopher de Lister circa 1459, nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1487, nel Midhope, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Thornton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Calverleyが1442年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Calverleyは18歳，母Agnes Tempestは15歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンでChristopher de Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1487年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミドhオペで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Calverley(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Calverley(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Tempest(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 Christopher de Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미드홉에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calverley nasceu em 1442, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Calverley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Tempest, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher de Lister aproximadamente 1459, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1487, em Midhope, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Thornton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Calverley родилась в 1442 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Calverley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Tempest, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher de Lister около 1459 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1487 г. в местности мидхоп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности таурнтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Calverley nació en 1442, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Calverley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnes Tempest, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Christopher de Lister aproximadamente 1459, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1487, en Midhope, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Thornton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
